name: NASM CES — A/A no-redirect (iOS parity validation)
_note: A/A test, no redirect. Goal: confirm iOS does NOT lose decisions or events vs the redirect test. Both variations sit on the same URL, so the variation is read from window.optimizely state (variationByState). Conversion = clicking the same 'Add to Cart' button each visit (fires an add_to_cart event, then navigates to /cart). Customer signed off; data to be discarded.

browser.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
